name: That Was a Putter!
description: Every throw this hole must be made with a putter (speed 1-3).

name: Off-Hand Tee
description: Everyone throws their tee shot with their non-dominant hand.

name: No Run-Up
description: No run-up allowed on any throw this hole — everyone throws from a standstill.

name: Scoober Zone
description: Any throw within 20m / 60ft of the basket must be thrown as a scoober.

name: Silent Hole
description: No talking, coaching, or advice allowed between throws this hole.

name: One Disc Wonder
description: Each player picks a single disc at the tee and plays the entire hole with only that disc.

name: Backwards Tee
description: Everyone tees off facing away from the basket, turning mid-throw.

name: Opposite Stance
description: All putts must be thrown with your stance reversed (opposite foot forward).

name: Sit-Down Circle
description: Any putt from inside the circle must be thrown from a seated position.

name: Roller Madness
description: Tee shots must be thrown as an intentional roller.

name: Sky or Anhyzer Only
description: Tee shots must be a hyzer flip or anhyzer — no straight shots allowed.

name: Slow-Mo Walk
description: Players must walk, not jog, to their disc between every throw this hole.

name: Grip It and Rip It
description: No practice throws or warmup swings allowed before any shot this hole.

name: Chicken Wing
description: Every approach shot must be thrown forehand — backhand is banned this hole.
